ns1:revision.ns1:comment: add links to LUG'19 and LUG'21
ns1:revision.ns1:text:
LUG 2020 was to be held in Berkeley, CA from June 9th-12th at NERSC, the [https://www.nersc.gov/ National Energy Research Scientific Computing Center]. Unfortunately, with the impact that the COVID-19 pandemic has had on individuals, families, and communities all over the world, the in-person LUG events were cancelled.
In its place, a series of online webinars that span topics of interest that would normally be covered at LUG will be presented.
== LUG 2020 Virtual Agenda ==
=== Wednesday, June 17th Webinar === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 12:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-Community_Release_Update-Jones.pdf|Lustre Community Release Update]]''' [https://youtu.be/jWAp00J66KQ?t=313 (video)] : Peter Jones, OpenSFS Lustre Working Group
|- |''' 12:30pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-OpenSFS_Update.pdf|OpenSFS Update]]''' [https://youtu.be/jWAp00J66KQ?t=2307 (video)] : OpenSFS Board of Directors
|- |''' 1:00pm''' |'''DDN Sponsor Presentation''' [https://youtu.be/jWAp00J66KQ?t=3286 (video)] : James Coomer, DDN
|- |''' 1:20pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-Lustre_2.14_and_Beyond-Dilger.pdf|Lustre 2.14 and Beyond]]''' [https://youtu.be/jWAp00J66KQ?t=4780 (video)] : Andreas Dilger, Whamcloud |}
=== Wednesday, August 5th Virtual Developer Day === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 8:00am''' |'''[[Media:VLUG2020-devday-Lustre_security-Buisson.pdf|Security Update]]''' :Sébastien Buisson, Whamcloud |}
=== Wednesday, September 9th Webinar === {| border=1 cellpadding=0
|- |''' 12:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-Scalable_Metrics_Collection-Eichelberger_Hall.pdf|Scalable Metrics Collection using Prometheus and Thanos]]''' [https://youtu.be/zN2x6FfhhRY?t=110 (video)] : Shawn Hall and Jonathan Eichelberger, BP
|- |''' 12:30pm''' |'''HA NVMe & PCI3 Gen4 Platform Update plus ZFS Multi-JBOD Cascade Support''' [https://youtu.be/zN2x6FfhhRY?t=2050 (video)] : Doug Johnson and Jeff Johnson, Aeon
|- |''' 1:00pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-Stanford_Research_Site_Update-Thiell.pdf|Stanford Site Update]]''' [https://youtu.be/zN2x6FfhhRY?t=3065 (video)] : Stephane Thiell, Stanford Site Update
|- |''' 1:20pm''' |'''[[Media:LUG2020-Lustre_File_System_at_Fugaku-Tsujita.pdf|Status of Lustre-Based File System at the Supercomputer Fugaku]]''' [https://youtu.be/zN2x6FfhhRY?t=4645 (video)] : Yuichi Tsujita, RIKEN |}
[[Lustre User Group 2019|<- LUG'19]] | [[Lustre User Group 2021|LUG'21 ->]]
[[Category: LUG]] [[Category: Events]]
